recommendations.title: Ginger Snaps
recommendations.overview: The story of two outcast sisters, Ginger and Brigitte, in the mindless suburban town of Bailey Downs. On the night of Ginger's first period, she is savagely attacked by a wild creature. Ginger's wounds miraculously heal but something is not quite rig

recommendations.title: Les Cowboys
recommendations.overview: Drama about a father and son who set out to find their missing daughter/sister with the help of an American headhunter.

recommendations.title: Hagazussa
recommendations.overview: In the 15th century, a young goatherd living alone in a mountain hut feels a dark presence in the woods.

recommendations.title: The Wild Boys
recommendations.overview: Island of La Réunion, in the beginning of the 20th century. Five teenagers commit a savage crime. As punishment, a Dutch captain takes them to a supernatural island with luxuriant vegetation and bewitching powers.

recommendations.title: An American Werewolf in Paris
recommendations.overview: An American man unwittingly gets involved with werewolves who have developed a serum allowing them to transform at will.

recommendations.title: The Wolf Man
recommendations.overview: After his brother's death, Larry Talbot returns home to his father and the family estate. Events soon take a turn for the worse when Larry is bitten by a werewolf.

recommendations.title: Hidden
recommendations.overview: A family takes refuge in a fallout shelter to avoid a dangerous outbreak.

recommendations.title: Ginger Snaps 2: Unleashed
recommendations.overview: Brigitte has escaped the confines of Bailey Downs but she's not alone. Another werewolf is tailing her closely and her sister's specter haunts her. An overdose of Monkshood - the poison that is keeping her transformation at bay - leads to her being i

recommendations.title: April and the Extraordinary World
recommendations.genres: Thriller, Adventure, Animation, Comedy, Fantasy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: It's 1941, but France is trapped in the 19th Century, governed by steam and Napoleon V. Avril, a teenage girl, goes in search of her missing scientist parents.

recommendations.title: The Settlers
recommendations.overview: Chile, early 20th century. José Menéndez, a wealthy landowner, hires three horsemen to mark out the perimeter of his extensive property and open a route to the Atlantic Ocean across vast Patagonia.
